summary_one_line: Input must be a well-formed OpenType sfnt header (version 0x00010000) carrying a GSUB/GPOS table tag so version.major==1 selects the version1 featureList case.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A valid OpenType font: the leading 4 bytes must equal the sfnt version 00 01 00 00, and a table-directory record must carry one of the literal FOURCC tags GPOS (47 50 4f 53) or GSUB (47 53 55 42) so that GSUBGPOS::u.version.major reads 1 and case 1 (return this+u.version1.featureList) is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds open with 00 01 00 00 (sfnt version major=1) and contain an exact GPOS or GSUB FOURCC: at offsets 0x0c-0x0f winner bytes concentrate on 47(G) 50(P)/53(S) 4f(O)/55(U) 53(S)/42(B), reproducing the GPOS/GSUB table tags the parser compares against.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short and lack the sfnt header and table tags: their first bytes scatter (00/e0/05/87 at 0x00, 00/0e/ff/07 at 0x01) and offsets 0x0c-0x0f hold no G/P/O/S or G/S/U/B literal, so version.major is never 1 and the true side stays unhit (T=0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the integer/string CMP that compares the parsed sfnt version and the table FOURCC against the constants 1, 'GPOS', 'GSUB'; I2SRandReplace lifts those operands out of the CmpLogObserver buffer and stamps them at the matching input offsets, manufacturing the exact magic bytes that naive/value_profile must stumble onto by blind havoc.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is case 1 of a switch on u.version.major returning the version1 featureList, and the true side is globally blocked.
The blocked side is the true branch.
Winner seeds begin with the sfnt version 00 01 00 00 and carry the GPOS table tag.
Another winner seed carries the GSUB table tag after the same sfnt version prefix.
At offset 0x0c winner bytes are uniformly 47 (G) while loser bytes scatter, marking the table tag position as informative dataflow.
At offsets 0x0d-0x0f winner bytes split GPOS/GSUB (P/S, O/U, S/B) while losers do not, confirming the FOURCC requirement.
Loser-blocking seeds are short and lack the sfnt header (e.g. a 6-byte seed with no 00 01 00 00 prefix).
cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CMP buffer and substitutes one intercepted operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so its loss against value_profile_cmplog is attributable to the I2S delta.
Both decisive pairs differ by the I2S technique with prob_div=1.00.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5545 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 002c9ad92acce91b`; chain has 31 levels and the tool reported the I2S-floor signal with 2 ancestor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 29 and 30, the floor evidence of an I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where naive/value_profile reach the version1 case at the same rate as cmplog/vpc when the gate is a plain integer/FOURCC equality comparison would refute the I2S attribution; equivalently, observing the true side resolved with no 00 01 00 00 prefix and no GPOS/GSUB tag present in the input.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff evidence localizes the GPOS/GSUB FOURCC at 0x0c-0x0f, but the sfnt-version comparison and the table-offset traversal between the directory and the GSUBGPOS struct are inferred from source structure rather than directly traced byte-by-byte.
